texto: There are many fishes in the sea and then there are a few beautiful swishy mermaids. Me?! No, I'm not the fish not even the mermaid, I don't belong to the sea. I am the Ocean! At a horizon far far away I'm a whirlpool of a storm rising and chasing, twirling and dancing to my own tunes and at another all calm serene still and silent, I am the ocean! limitless boundless infinite and as beautiful as I may seem from the outside, I have life within!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Himanjali Singh que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “There are many fishes in the sea and then there are a few beautiful swishy mermaids. Me?! No, I'm…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, authentic-self, brave, com foco em dia-chuvoso e inspiracao.
